fields.name: Manali- Family package
fields.description:
Travel Package: MANALI FAMILY PACKAGE
Price: ₹ 12999.00 
Duration: 03N / 04 Days Completely in Manali
INCLUSIONS 📌
* 📌 Delhi - Manali - Delhi Volvo Bus 2 Tickets
* 📌 3 Night Accommodation in hotel
* 📌 Double Sharing Basis Accommodation in Hotel (Deluxe Room in Use, Non AC Room)
* 📌 All Days Breakfast and Dinner
* 📌 Pick up and Drop from Manali Volvo Bus Stand to Hotel
* 📌 One Day Sightseeing of Local Manali by Private Car
* 📌 One Full Day Sightseeing of Solang Valley by Private Car
* 📌 One Full Day Sightseeing of Kullu - Nagar Castle by Private Car
* 📌 All taxes included
EXCLUSIONS
* ❌ Up & down traveling Charges to Delhi
* ❌ Lunch Food
* ❌ Entry Charges
EXTRAS
* 🔳 Room Heater
* 🔳 Game Activities
* 🔳 Entry Fee in sightseeing places
* 🔳 Kesar Milk, Cake for Honeymoon Night
* 🔳 Rotang Pass
* 🔳 Sissu Valley
* 🔳 Extra Day Sightseeing
* 🔳 Shopping Costs
ITINERARY
DAY 01: DELHI - MANALI (570 KMS)
Catch the Volvo bus from Delhi to Manali in the evening (5:00 P.M) to proceed Overnight journey towards Manali in the Volvo bus.
DAY 02: MANALI ARRIVAL (LOCAL MANALI)
Arrive Manali in the morning, check in the hotel and after having some rest proceed to local Manali Sightseeing:
* 📍 Hadimba Devi Temple
* 📍 Manu Temple Van Vihar
* 📍 Club House
* 📍 Shiva Temple
* 📍 Tibetan Monasteries
* 📍 Evening free to visit Mall Road
* 📍 Dinner
* 📍 Overnight stay at the hotel
DAY 03: SOLANG VALLEY
Morning after breakfast proceed to full day sightseeing:
* 📍 Solang Valley
* 📍 Dinner
* 📍 Overnight stay at hotel
DAY 04: KULLU-NAGGAR
Morning after breakfast, Full day sightseeing:
* 📍 Kullu Valley
* 📍 Naggar Castle Sightseeing
* 📍 Parvati River
* 📍 Vaishno Devi Temple
DAY 05: MANALI TO DELHI
Morning after Breakfast, Check out form the hotel. And the rest of the day at leisure in the evening catch the volvo bus from Manali to Delhi overnight Journey in the bus.

fields.name: Grand Kerala Tour Package
fields.description:
₹29,999/
Per Person
6 Days / 5 Nights
Max People : 2
Kerala
Kerala, with its lush landscapes, tranquil backwaters, and vibrant culture, is a dream destination. From the hill stations of Munnar to the serene backwaters of Alleppey, this tour takes you through the best of what Kerala has to offer. Whether you’re sipping tea in Munnar, cruising the backwaters, or soaking in the coastal vibes of Varkala, this 6-day trip is a perfect blend of nature, culture, and relaxation!

Included and Excluded
Up & Down Train Tickets (Non-AC Sleeper) From Your Hometown To Kochi 🚆
Pickup From Ernakulam Railway Station To Munnar By Private Cab 🚗
2 Nights Accommodation In Munnar With Balcony View 🌄 (1 Room)
2 Days Breakfast & Dinner In Munnar 🍽️
Kochi And Mattupetti Direction Tour 🏞️
Munnar To Thekkady Travel By Private AC Cab 🚙
1 Night Accommodation In Thekkady 🏨
Breakfast & Dinner In Thekkady 🍽️
Enroute Sightseeing From Munnar To Thekkady 🌳
Thekkady To Varkala Travel By Private AC Cab 🚗
1 Night AC Accommodation In Varkala 🏖️ With Breakfast
Visit Jatayu Earth Center In Varkala 🦅
Varkala To Alleppey Sightseeing By Private AC Cab 🚙
1 Night Hygienic Sanitized AC Houseboat Stay (Deluxe Single Bed Room With Upper Deck) 🚤
Lunch, Dinner & Breakfast On The Houseboat (Kari Meen Fry Available) 🍤
Tea, Coffee & Snacks Provided During Houseboat Stay ☕🍪
Drop From Boat House To Alleppey Railway Station By Auto 🛺
Driver Charges, Parking Charges Included 🅿️
24/7 Customer Support Available 📞
Personal Expenses
Entry Fees To Some Attractions
Additional Meals & Drinks
Highlights of the Tour
Scenic Beauty: Explore The Lush Hills Of Munnar, The Wildlife Of Thekkady, And The Beaches Of Varkala.
Houseboat Bliss: Experience The Serene Backwaters Of Kerala In A Deluxe Houseboat.
Delicious Kerala Cuisine: Relish Local Dishes Like Kari Meen Fry, And Enjoy Authentic Meals At Every Stop.
Comfortable Travel: Private AC Cabs And A Relaxing Train Journey Ensure A Comfortable Trip Throughout.

fields.name: Navam Nutri Pro
fields.description:
Navam Nutri Pro: Traditional Women’s Health Drink
Elevate your daily wellness with Navam Nutri Pro, a premium plant-based protein powder crafted specifically for women. Combining the ancient wisdom of sprouted and fried grains, this 500g powerhouse features 22 natural ingredients, including Ragi, Kodo Millet, and Red Rice, enriched with Almonds, Cashews, and Pistachios.
Designed for a balanced and natural lifestyle, it serves as a nutrient-dense porridge that supports bone health and sustained energy. Simply whisk two tablespoons into milk or water, boil for two minutes, and enjoy. Pure, traditional, and free from artificial fillers—it’s India’s premium choice for holistic nutrition.

fields.name: Sea Buckthorn Juice
fields.description:
Vedaon Natural Sea Buckthorn Juice is a potent, nutrient-dense wellness elixir crafted from pure Himalayan berries. Often called the "Holy Fruit," this juice is a rare plant-based source of Omega-3, 6, 9, and the elusive Omega-7, which supports skin regeneration and digestive health.  
Rich in Vitamin C, flavonoids, and antioxidants, it serves as a powerful immunity booster and natural energy enhancer. Its tart, citrusy profile reflects its raw, minimally processed nature, ensuring no artificial colors or flavors. Regular consumption aids in detoxifying the body, improving cardiovascular health, and maintaining a radiant complexion.  
Key Benefits
* Heart Health: High Omega-7 content helps maintain healthy cholesterol levels.  
* Skin Vitality: Promotes collagen production and hydration.  
* Immune Support: Packed with more Vitamin C than oranges.

fields.name: Utro Free
fields.description:
UTRO FREE 100% Natural Bamboo Pads are designed for the strong, fearless woman who prioritizes both health and the environment. Crafted from ultra-soft bamboo fiber, these pads provide a breathable, rash-free experience with superior absorption and advanced odor control technology.
Completely free from plastics and harsh chemicals, our 100% biodegradable pads offer a sustainable alternative that is safe for your skin and the soil. By choosing UTRO FREE, you embrace a premium, eco-conscious lifestyle without compromising on comfort. Make a small change for a big impact. Feel Pure. Feel Free.

fields.name: Acaiberry-Juice
fields.description:
Vedaon Natural Acai Berry Juice is a potent wellness supplement derived from premium, sustainably sourced Amazonian berries. Renowned for its exceptionally high antioxidant content, this juice is formulated to neutralize free radicals, supporting cellular health and immune resilience. Rich in essential Omega-3, 6, and 9 fatty acids, it promotes cardiovascular health and enhances skin vitality from within.
This natural elixir also aids metabolic function, providing a sustained energy boost without synthetic additives or artificial sugars. Its clean, earthy flavor profile makes it a perfect daily addition for those seeking holistic vitality. Experience pure, plant-based nutrition designed to revitalize your body and mind.

fields.name: Vedaon-Pure Alovera Gel
fields.description:
This VEDAON Premium Pure Aloe Vera Gel is presented as a versatile, all-natural beauty solution housed in a clear, textured glass jar with a sophisticated deep-green and gold label. Marketed as "Nature’s Elixir," the product is designed for multi-purpose use on the face, body, and hair.
The formula emphasizes purity, specifically highlighting that it is alcohol and paraben-free, making it a gentle choice for sensitive skin. The gel’s crystal-clear consistency suggests a lightweight, non-greasy texture intended to hydrate and soothe. Surrounded by fresh aloe leaves and delicate white flora, the packaging reflects an eco-conscious, botanical aesthetic rooted in wellness.

fields.name: Vedaon - Nirvaa
fields.description:
Elevate your daily ritual with Vedaon Nirvaa’s Activated Charcoal Soap, a masterpiece of handcrafted skincare. Encased in elegant, gold-embellished packaging, this 100% natural and organic soap is designed for those who seek a deep, detoxifying cleanse without compromising on luxury.
Infused with premium organic activated charcoal, coconut oil, and olive oil, the gentle formula draws out impurities and excess oils while nourishing the skin. Its rich, velvety lather leaves your complexion feeling purified, refreshed, and balanced. Experience the "luxury of nature" with a chemical-free, sustainable bar that prioritizes both your skin’s health and the planet’s well-being.

fields.name: Velvet Bean Honey
fields.description:
This premium Velvet Bean Honey by Vedaon is a sophisticated wellness blend, presented in a classic square glass jar with an elegant gold-toned lid. The rich, dark amber hue of the honey suggests a deep, robust flavor profile derived from high-quality nectar.
As a "mixed product," it combines the natural sweetness of honey with the nutritional powerhouse of velvet bean (Mucuna pruriens). The label highlights its functional benefits, specifically designed to support vitality, muscle energy, and cognitive function. It’s an ideal choice for those seeking a natural supplement that promotes overall well-being with a touch of luxury.

fields.name: Diabetic Care
fields.description:
This Vedaon Diabetic Care Advanced Formula is a specialized dietary supplement designed to support metabolic health and blood sugar management. Encased in a professional white bottle with a clean, navy blue label, the product highlights three primary health goals: maintaining healthy blood sugar levels, supporting insulin sensitivity, and providing anti-inflammatory support.
The branding features the Vedaon logo and an illustrative graphic of a glucose monitor, emphasizing its targeted use for those monitoring their glycemic index. As an "Advanced Formula," it likely blends traditional herbal ingredients with modern nutritional science to promote holistic wellness. This supplement serves as a convenient addition to a balanced diet and active lifestyle for individuals seeking proactive support for their metabolic well-being and long-term vitality

fields.name: Curcumin Capsule
fields.description:
This high-quality supplement bottle features Curcumin Pure Extract Capsules, presented in a sleek, matte black container with a sophisticated gold-toned cap. The deep blue label is elegantly designed with gold accents, highlighting its "100% Natural Herbameral Extracts" and a 60-capsule count.
To emphasize its botanical origins, the bottle is staged alongside fresh, sliced turmeric roots and a vibrant mound of golden turmeric powder, all resting on a polished wooden surface. The moody, dark green gradient background creates a premium, apothecary-style aesthetic that communicates purity and wellness. This concentrated formula is designed to deliver the potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory benefits of turmeric in a convenient, professional-grade format, making it an essential addition to any modern health regimen.

fields.name: Meera-Anti Dandruff Shampoo
fields.description: Meera Anti-Dandruff Shampoo combines herbal ingredients to gently cleanse the scalp and reduce dandruff. It controls flakes, soothes irritation, and strengthens hair roots. Regular use keeps hair fresh, soft, and healthy, giving long-lasting cleanliness and a naturally refreshed feeling daily.

fields.name: Meera -Kunkudukai & Badam Shampoo
fields.description: Meera Kunkudukai and Badam Shampoo blends traditional soapnut cleansing with nourishing almond goodness. It gently removes dirt, strengthens hair, adds shine, reduces dryness, and leaves hair soft, smooth, and refreshed.

fields.name: Yippee-4 in one Pack
fields.description: Yippee 4-in-One Pack offers delicious instant noodles in multiple tasty flavors, perfect for quick meals and sharing. Easy to cook and full of flavor, it’s a convenient choice for anytime hunger cravings.

fields.name: Vatika -Health Shampoo
fields.description: Vatika Shampoo nourishes hair with natural herbal extracts, helping reduce dryness, strengthen roots, and improve shine. Its gentle formula cleanses effectively, leaving hair soft, manageable, and refreshed after each wash.

fields.name: Vicco- Vajradanti Paste
fields.description: Vicco Vajradanti Toothpaste is an Ayurvedic formula enriched with herbal ingredients that help strengthen gums, reduce tooth problems, control bad breath, and support overall oral health with a natural clean.

fields.name: Vim-Liquid
fields.description: Vim Liquid Dishwash effectively removes tough grease and stains with a powerful lemon formula. It cleans utensils quickly, leaves no residue, and provides long-lasting freshness while being gentle on hands.

fields.name: Vim - Bar
fields.description: Vim Bar is a powerful dishwashing soap that removes stubborn grease and food stains easily. Its active formula delivers sparkling clean utensils, long-lasting freshness, and effective cleaning with every wash.

fields.name: Sensodyne-Tooth paste
fields.description: Sensodyne Toothpaste is specially formulated for sensitive teeth, providing lasting protection against sensitivity pain while strengthening enamel, promoting gum health, and delivering gentle yet effective cleaning for oral care comfort.

fields.name: Surf Excel Matic
fields.description: Surf Excel Matic detergent is specially designed for washing machines, removing tough stains while protecting fabric color and softness. Its powerful formula ensures deep cleaning, freshness, and performance per wash.

fields.name: Vcare-Herbal Hair Dye
fields.description: V Care Herbal Hair Dye offers natural-looking color enriched with herbal ingredients. It covers grey hair effectively, nourishes strands, reduces damage, and leaves hair soft, shiny, with long-lasting results finish.

fields.name: Sree Nandhini Sambrani Cup
fields.description: Sree Nandhini Samburani Cup releases a soothing traditional fragrance that purifies surroundings, creates a calm spiritual atmosphere, and helps freshen homes and prayer spaces with long-lasting aromatic smoke naturally daily.

fields.name: Navratna - Ayurvedic Oil
fields.description: Navratna Ayurvedic Oil is a cooling herbal hair oil enriched with natural ingredients that relax the mind, reduce stress, nourish scalp, strengthen roots, and promote healthy, shiny hair with aroma.

fields.name: Mysore Sandal  Soap -75g
fields.description: Mysore Sandal Soap is a premium bathing bar enriched with pure sandalwood oil, gently cleansing skin while nourishing and moisturizing. It leaves a refreshing fragrance, texture, and a natural glow.

fields.name: Medimix  Sandal Soap
fields.description: Medimix Sandal Soap blends Ayurvedic herbs with soothing sandalwood to gently cleanse, nourish, and protect skin. It helps maintain freshness, improves texture, and leaves a calming fragrance for healthy-looking skin.

fields.name: Margo-Soap
fields.description: Margo Soap is enriched with natural neem extracts that help fight germs, control acne, and keep skin fresh. It gently cleanses, protects from impurities, and promotes healthy, clear skin daily.

fields.name: Munch Max
fields.description: Nestlé Munch Max is a crunchy wafer chocolate bar layered with delicious cocoa cream and coated in rich chocolate, offering a light, crispy bite perfect for quick snacks and cravings.

fields.name: Mugi Fresh -1 ltr
fields.description: Mugi Fresh 1 Litre floor cleaner delivers powerful cleaning with a refreshing fragrance. It removes dirt, stains, and germs effectively, leaving floors hygienic, shiny, and scented for a clean home.

fields.name: Moov Cream
fields.description: Moov Pain Relief Cream provides fast relief from muscle and joint pain with a powerful Ayurvedic formula. It penetrates deeply, reduces stiffness, relaxes muscles, and helps you stay active comfortably.

fields.name: Nycil  Powder
fields.description: Nycil Cooling Powder protects skin from sweat, heat, and itching with its soothing formula. It absorbs excess moisture, prevents rashes, and keeps skin cool, fresh, and comfortable throughout summer days.

fields.name: Tide - Washing Powder 1Kg
fields.description: Tide Washing Powder 1kg delivers powerful stain removal with advanced cleaning formula. It removes tough dirt, brightens clothes, maintains fabric freshness, and provides a long-lasting clean fragrance after every wash.

fields.name: Zundu Balm Red
fields.description: Zandu Balm Red provides fast relief from headaches, body aches, and cold discomfort with its strong Ayurvedic formula. It delivers warming comfort, improves blood circulation, and helps feel relaxed quickly.
